content.json:
# Sentinel — Ingestion & Alert Health (Lab)
Data volume by table and security alerts by severity. Useful for keeping a lab workspace within its daily ingestion cap.

content.query:
Usage
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize IngestedGB = round(sum(Quantity) / 1000, 3) by DataType
| top 15 by IngestedGB desc
content.title: Billable ingestion by table (GB)

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| summarize Alerts = count() by AlertSeverity
| order by Alerts desc
content.title: Security alerts by severity

content.query:
union withsource=TableName *
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Records = count() by TableName
| top 20 by Records desc
content.title: Records ingested in the last 24h by table
